title: All 6 CSV datasets loadable and queryable
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:197-217 load-all! loads all 6 files; data_test.clj:62-78 verifies all datasets

title: Match queries across all competitions
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/server.clj:14-46 tool definitions; tools.clj:42-122 match query implementations

title: Player search by name, nationality, club
Team statistics and head-to-head comparison
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/tools.clj:128-193 team queries; tools_test.clj:63-80 tests verify calculations

title: Team name normalization with state suffix handling
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:33-52 normalize_team_name and team_matches functions; data_test.clj:9-22 verifies normalization

title: League standings calculation from match results
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/tools.clj:241-277 calculate_standings and get_season_winner; tools_test.clj:114-128 tests 2019 final standings

title: All tests passing: 20 tests with 87 assertions
evidence: Test run output: 0 failures, 0 errors; test files include data_test.clj and tools_test.clj

title: Cross-file queries available but not explicitly integrated
evidence: Tools query match data and player data separately; no single tool combines player+match filters
suggestion: Could add explicit cross-file queries like 'find_players_at_team_in_season' for seamless integration

title: Multiple date format support implemented
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:70-86 parse_date handles ISO, ISO datetime, Brazilian DD/MM/YYYY formats; data_test.clj:38-56 tests all formats
suggestion: Handles all data format variations in specification

title: Performance not dynamically tested
evidence: Tests pass quickly without timeout, implementation uses simple filtering; no explicit performance benchmarking
suggestion: Consider adding performance tests for large aggregations if response time becomes critical
